details_html:
Premium HSS 4241 Twist Drill Bits

High-Performance Drilling for Everyday Applications

Manufactured for durability and efficiency, our HSS 4241 twist drill bits offer the perfect balance of reliable quality and exceptional cost-effectiveness for your hardware sourcing needs.

Why Choose Our 4241 Drill Bits?

  • Exceptional Quality: Made from selected High-Speed Steel (HSS 4241), featuring high hardness, smooth chip removal, and excellent wear resistance for general-purpose drilling.
  • Comprehensive Sizes: Available in a full range of diameters and lengths (both metric and imperial standards) to perfectly match your specific processing requirements.
  • Customizable Packaging (OEM Supported): We provide flexible packaging solutions. From individual plastic tubes and blister cards to professional metal box sets, we can customize the packaging with your brand logo to enhance your market presence.

Versatile Applications

Ideal for general-purpose drilling. Highly efficient on wood, plastics, aluminum alloys, and thin mild steel.
*Note: For heavy-duty stainless steel or hard metal drilling, please inquire about our HSS-Co (M35) series.

details_html:
Industrial-Grade HSS M2 (6542) Twist Drill Bits

Uncompromising Precision and Durability for Professional Machining

Engineered for demanding industrial environments, our HSS M2 (6542) twist drill bits deliver superior wear resistance and thermal stability. This is the gold standard for hardware professionals seeking continuous, high-speed drilling performance.

Core Advantages

details_html:
Top-Tier HSS-Co M35 Cobalt Twist Drill Bits

The Ultimate Solution for Stainless Steel and Hard Metals

Engineered with a 5% cobalt alloy, our M35 twist drill bits deliver extraordinary heat resistance and red hardness. When standard drill bits fail or burn out, Xiaoman Tools' M35 series powers through the toughest industrial applications.

Why Upgrade to Our M35 Cobalt Bits?

  • Extreme Heat Resistance (5% Cobalt): The M35 cobalt-infused steel maintains its sharp cutting edge at much higher temperatures than standard HSS, drastically reducing tool wear when machining hard materials.
  • Precision 135-Degree Split Point: Designed to prevent "walking" on the material surface, ensuring instant, accurate drilling with less force required.
  • OEM Branding & Custom Packaging: Build your brand with us. We offer fully customizable packaging options, including professional metal index boxes, blister packs, and premium plastic tubes, all proudly displaying your logo.
  • Premium Quality & After-Sales Guarantee: At Xiaoman Tools, your satisfaction is our priority. We provide strict pre-shipment quality control, dedicated technical support, and a responsive after-sales policy to protect your investment.

Expert Applications

Specifically designed for drilling hard, tough, and abrasive materials. Exceptional performance on Stainless Steel (304/316), Titanium Alloys, Cast Iron, and High-Tensile Steels.

name: Through-Coolant Solid Carbide Drill Bit
description: High-Performance Solid Carbide Drill Bit with Through-Coolant (3xD / 5xD / 8xD)

specs.Workpiece Materials: Stainless steel, titanium alloy, cast iron, spring steel
specs.Machine Setup: CNC machining center, engraving machine, precision engraving machine, lathe
specs.Instant Heat Dissipation: Internal coolant flows direjctly to the drill tip, preventing thermal cracking, tool burnout, and material work-hardening during high-speed operations.
specs.Flawless Chip Evacuation: The high-pressure coolant forcefully flushes chips out of the flutes instantly, completely eliminating chip packing and the risk of drill breakage in deep blind holes.
specs.Higher Feed & Speed Rates: Achieves up to 2-3 times the penetration rate of external-coolant carbide drills, drastically reducing cycle times.
